name: The Other Me
original_name: อีกคนในใจเธอ
overview:
In a small cafe, under the warm afternoon light, two women accidentally meet—a woman whose heart is sealed by a secret from the past, and another who hides her feelings behind a seemingly innocent smile.

Every conversation…every glance…slowly opens the door to an unintended connection. But the deeper they go, the more dangerous it becomes, as a certain truth could change everything forever.

trailers.title: [Official Teaser] The Other Me อีกคนในใจเธอ | JPC Media
